name: onboarding_refuse_field_graceful
notes: Owner refuses to answer a still-needed field in NATURAL LANGUAGE — not the literal 'skip'/'baad' tokens already covered by onboarding_defer_field_explicit_skip.json / onboarding_defer_field_hinglish_baad.json. The refusal must be handled gracefully (acknowledged, not pressed) and never looped on verbatim. Setup: `setup --owner-inputs true --journey` (ACTIVE journey: confirm business_type='sweets' resolves first, then the 'about' gap is the refused field) then `script <tenant> onboarding_refuse_field_graceful.json`.

steps.note: Confirms the seeded business_type guess, advancing the queue to the 'about' gap.

steps.message: I don't really want to write out a whole description of my shop, isn't the name enough?
steps.note: A natural-language refusal of the 'about' field (not the literal skip token). Expect a graceful, non-pushy response — never coercive pressure to answer.

assert_not_contains: tell us a little about your business
what do you sell or do
steps.note: Owner reiterates the refusal. Expect the manager to move the conversation forward WITHOUT re-presenting the identical 'about' ask a second time.
